refnamediv.refpurpose: Remove small connected components from a binary image.

refsynopsisdiv.title: Syntax
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: bwout = imbwareaopen(image, minSize) bwout = imbwareaopen(image, minSize, connectivity)

listitem.para: A 2D binary or numeric image. Nonzero values are foreground.
Minimum connected-component area, as a positive integer number of pixels.
4 or 8 pixel connectivity. The default is 8.
A boolean image containing only components with area at least minSize.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: imbwareaopen labels the foreground with imconnectedcomponents and removes components smaller than the requested area.

refsection.title: Examples
